disclaimer: SAE-generic (Pxxxx, digit 2 = 0) codes and their meanings are standardized (SAE J2012) and safe to treat as universal. Manufacturer-enhanced codes (digit 2 = 1, e.g. FCA P1xxx) are NOT reproduced here beyond what public TSB summaries describe, and must be verified against a real service manual / AlfaOBD readout before acting — do not treat this dictionary as authoritative for enhanced codes.

P0017.description: Crankshaft Position - Camshaft Position Correlation (Bank 1 Sensor B)

P0442.description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (Small Leak)

P0456.description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (Very Small Leak)
P0456.note: Same small-leak EVAP family as P0442 (SAE J2012); still maps to EvapCodeSmall — no new fault class.

P0455.description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (Large Leak)

P0457.description: Evaporative Emission System Leak Detected (Fuel Cap Loose/Off)
P0457.note: Cap-off / loose-cap family (SAE J2012); maps to EvapCodeLarge with P0455 / Mode 06 $39.

P0316.description: Engine Misfire Detected on Startup (First 1000 Revolutions)
P0316.note: Startup/first-1000-rev misfire (SAE J2012); same CylinderMisfire concept as P0300–P0308.

P0011.note: Standard SAE cam-timing code that commonly trips on MultiAir electrohydraulic valve actuation faults. Per TSB 05047457A, rule out low oil / wrong viscosity / dirty oil / a clogged oil-galley screen BEFORE condemning the MultiAir actuator.

P0014.note: See P0011 note — same TSB 05047457A pre-check order applies.
